Project Sol

Currently unreleased, this is our upcoming RTS game for the OGPC 2026 season! This game features procedural solar system generation, mass unit movement, space stations, logistics, and more! Set to release sometime this year, hopefully in the fall, playtests may come earlier this year, so stay tuned for more updates! 

Below you can see some of our concept art!
